rulings.Case Title: VISHAL GROVER VS. WILLIAM CAMPBELL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Nrt West, Inc. To Produce Guidelines For Multiple Offer Presentations Or, In The Alternative, For An In Limine Order Barring Introduction Of Certain Evidence At Trial
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 19, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT MARJORIE CAMPBELL's Amended Motion To Compel Nrt West, Inc. To Produce Guidelines For Multiple Offer Presentations Or, In The Alternative, For An In Limine Order Barring Introduction Of Certain Evidence At Trial transferred to Department 301 to be heard on January 5, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. Courtesy copies of all motion filings to be delivered to department 301 no later than December 19, 2017 by 4:00 p.m. by the respective parties with cover letters indicating new hearing date, time and department. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Or In The Alternative To Compel Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 19, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT STEFAN ADLER and JENNIFER ROSDAIL's Motion To Enforce Settlement Or In The Alternative To Compel Arbitration continued to January 11, 2018 on Court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ERNA SUE GRISSOM VS. JENNIFER ROSAIL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 19, 2017 line 2. PLAINTIFF ERNA GRISSOM's Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint continued to January 11, 2018 on Court's own motion.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YEVA, INC. DBA SAXE MORTGAGE COMPANY VS. ANNE KRAJEWSKI HARBERT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Renewed Motion And Renewed Motion To Set Aside And To Vacate Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 19, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT ANNE HARBERT's Renewed Motion To Set Aside And To Vacate Default And Default Judgment DENIED. Moving party fails to meet the burden under CCP 1008 and CCP 473. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1750 MCALLISTER, LP. VS. THE ESTATEOF IKE CAMPBELL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 19, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT TASHA CAMPBELL's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT GRANTED. Judgment shall be vacated and action dismissed.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1520 GOUGH STREET, LLC VS. HANNAH STEVENSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 19, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT HANNAH STEVENSON's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT Hearing required. Defendant to present a file endorsed copy of the proof of service of her motion to vacate and order shortening time. Defendant shall be prepared to post $2,336.54. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DR. BERNARDO D. GONZLEZ III VS. ERNESTO A. SANCHEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 19, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANT ERNESTO SANCHEZ's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint is not uncertain within the meaning of CCP 430.10(f). = (501/REQ)
